---
title: "Historical Dramas. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe, etc.”"
---

## Historical Dramas. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe, etc.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1864
**Genre:** Fiction (drama)
**Format:** Book 8vo npn

**Publisher:** Groombridge and Sons, 5, Paternoster Row, London.

### Notes

Contains The Mice at Play, The Apple of Discord, The Strayed Falcon. [plays]   It was one of Groombridge’s gift book series.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
